meta.title: Frameless — Financial Freedom Without Borders
meta.description: Crypto-native super app for digital nomads. Virtual cards, bookings, and eSIM powered by stablecoins.

hero.subtitle: A unified financial ecosystem for life without borders. Manage virtual cards, book hotels, and activate eSIM — all powered by USDT/USDC with zero hidden conversion fees.

ecosystem.label: Ecosystem
ecosystem.title: One App. Everything You Need.
ecosystem.subtitle: Three pillars of borderless life — banking, travel, and connectivity — united in a single super app with no compromises.

banking.title: Banking & Cards
banking.description: Forget P2P exchangers. Instant stablecoin transactions at any store worldwide via virtual Visa/Mastercard.
banking.feature1: Virtual & physical cards funded with USDT/USDC
banking.feature3: Instant card issuance in under 30 seconds

travel.title: Travel & Bookings
travel.description: Access wholesale Net-Rate pricing on 180,000+ hotels worldwide. Why pay retail when you can pay wholesale?
travel.feature2: Flights via Duffel API with stablecoin payments
travel.feature3: Integrated trip planning and expense tracking

connectivity.title: Global eSIM
connectivity.description: Internet in 200+ countries activates instantly upon landing. No roaming charges, no SIM swap, no hassle.
connectivity.feature2: Pay in stablecoins at competitive data rates
connectivity.feature3: Auto-connect when landing in a new country

security.title: Invisible Complexity
security.subtitle: Enterprise-grade security with the simplicity of a consumer app. Your assets are protected by cutting-edge cryptography.
security.userSubtitle: You see simplicity. We handle the complexity behind the scenes.
security.userFeature1Desc: FaceID or fingerprint — no passwords to remember
security.userFeature2Desc: No seed phrases, no complex addresses
security.techSubtitle: Threshold Signature Scheme splits your private key across isolated environments.
security.techDescription: No single point of failure. Not even Frameless can access your assets without your device's biometric confirmation. Full non-custodial architecture with institutional-grade compliance.

personas.title: Built For Your Lifestyle
personas.subtitle: Whether you code from Bali or run a business from Dubai — Frameless adapts to your unique needs.

it.label: IT Professional
it.title: Focus on Code, Not Banking
it.description: Manage global subscriptions, access premium co-working spaces, and get instant connectivity in every new city without touching a bank branch.

crypto.label: Crypto Entrepreneur
crypto.title: Protect & Grow Your Portfolio
crypto.description: Optimize tax residency, protect assets from inflation, and provide your family with seamless access to international services — all from one app.

nomad.label: Web3 Nomad
nomad.title: True Fiat-Free Lifestyle
nomad.description: Live entirely on crypto without bank restrictions. Direct DeFi access, zero-friction spending, and complete financial sovereignty.

freelancer.label: Freelancer
freelancer.title: Maximize Every Dollar Earned
freelancer.description: Transparent commissions, powerful cost-of-life tools, and instant invoice payments. Keep more of what you earn.
freelancer.feature1: Transparent fees — no hidden costs ever

finalCta.title: Stop Losing Money on Fees & Borders
finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of digital nomads who chose financial freedom. Your borderless life starts with one email.

footer.tagline: The financial super app for digital nomads. Banking, travel, and connectivity — powered by stablecoins.
